title: DeepSeek 新模型重要的三个原因
content: 周五，中国人工智能公司 DeepSeek 发布了其期待已久的新旗舰机型 V4 的预览。值得注意的是，由于新设计有助于更有效地处理大量文本，该模型可以处理比上一代更长的提示。与 DeepSeek 之前的型号一样，V4 是 o
original_title: Three reasons why DeepSeek’s new model matters
original_content: On Friday, Chinese AI firm DeepSeek released a preview of V4, its long-awaited new flagship model. Notably, the model can process much longer prompts than its last generation, thanks to a new design that helps it handle large amounts of text more efficiently. title: PrivUn：揭示隐私遗忘中的潜在涟漪效应和浅层遗忘
content:
arXiv:2604.22076v1 公告类型：新

original_title: PrivUn: Unveiling Latent Ripple Effects and Shallow Forgetting in Privacy Unlearning
original_content:
arXiv:2604.22076v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often memorize private information during training, raising serious privacy concerns. While machine unlearning has emerged as a promising solution, its true effectiveness against privacy attacks remains unclear. To address

title: 佛罗里达州总检察长在 FSU 枪击事件后对 ChatGPT 制造商 OpenAI 展开刑事调查
content: 佛罗里达州总检察长 James Uthmeier 对 OpenAI 展开调查，调查该公司是否对去年佛罗里达州立大学发生的枪击事件负有刑事责任。
original_title: Florida attorney general launches criminal investigation into ChatGPT maker OpenAI after deadly FSU shooting
original_content: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier opened an investigation into OpenAI over whether the company bears criminal responsibility for a shooting at Florida State University last year.

title: 微软针对 macOS 和 Linux ASP.NET 威胁发布紧急更新

title: 苹果下一任首席执行官需要推出杀手级人工智能产品
content: 蒂姆·库克是一位伟大的首席执行官，但他并没有破解人工智能。  这是约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 的首要工作。
original_title: Apple's Next CEO Needs to Launch a Killer AI Product
original_content: Tim Cook was a great CEO, but he didn’t crack AI.  It’s job number 1 for John Ternus.
